column9:
Exciting Grading Time
CD: 195s
Buff all fellows for 18s. Start to grading their score base on their performance. 
[Grading]
- When fellow using skill, gain 1 grade point (Demigod fellows give 2 points instead)
- Heal fellows 1% HP for every 1 point gained.
[Scoring]
- 10 Points : Increase fellow damage by 25%. And when score increase, send small kupoles fly toward enemy dealing 50% damage. This damage ignore 30% Def
- 20 Points : Extend buff duration by 5s. Small Kupole SFR become 80%
- 35 Points : All fellows decrease damage taken by 15%. Small Kupole SFR become 90%
- 50 Points : Extend buff duration by 5s. Small Kupole SFR become 110%
- 75 Points : Increase damage/reduce damage taken buff doubled. Small Kupole SFR become 170%
- 100 Points : Extend buff duration by 5s. Release 5 Small Kupoles at once.

Once the score reach 100 it can no longer accumulate any grade points. But fellow damage/DR buff persists until duration is over.
